revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Info|To add an article to this category, tag it with {{#ifeq:{{{topic|}}}||{{tl|Expand {{{language|}}}}}|{{tlp|Expand {{{language|}}}|2=topic={{{topic}}}}}}}. (Do not add articles to this category directly.)}}
{{#ifeq:{{{topic|}}}||[[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias|{{{language}}}]]|[[Category:Articles needing translation from {{{language}}} Wikipedia| ]]}}
{{Hidden category}}{{Possibly empty category}}
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation
|content=
[[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]]
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">
{{Translation category
|language=
|topic=
}}</syntaxhighlight>
}}
</noinclude>

{{Hidden category}}{{Possibly empty category}}
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation
|content=
[[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]]
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">
{{Translation category
|language=
|topic=
}}</syntaxhighlight>
}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Info|To add an article to this category, tag it with {{#ifeq:{{{topic|}}}||{{tl|Expand {{{language|}}}}}|{{tlp|Expand {{{language|}}}|2=topic={{{topic}}}}}}}. (Do not add articles to this category directly.)}}
{{#ifeq:{{{topic|}}}|||}}
{{Hidden category}}{{Possibly empty category}}
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation
|content=
[[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]]
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">
{{Translation category
|language=
|topic=
}}</syntaxhighlight>
}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias|{{{language}}}]]
[[Category:Articles needing translation from {{{language}}} Wikipedia| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
